Video.summary: Witness the human drama of competitor’s desperation for victory and the resulting mechanical carnage.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 11

Video.summary: Follow the exploits of teams all over the country as they battle it out in hopes of becoming champion.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 12

Video.summary: The pace steps up a gear as Philippa investigates behind the scenes of the series’ first Semi-finals.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 13

Video.summary: The second round of semi-finals follows six more teams that have made it through the heats and are one step closer to Grand Final.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 14

Video.summary: Four robotic warriors have battled their way to the Grand Final. The other competitors have been sent to a scrapheap. See what it’s like behind the scenes of the most intense stage of the competition.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 15

Video.summary: Celebrities take to the arena, teaming up with veterans from the series and their robots. The celebrities must control the robots for at least 60 seconds before the professionals can take over.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars

Image.alt: The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars
The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars
The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars

Video.summary: Four teams take part in the tag team terror tournament. Two teams comprised of two robots enter the arena at once. Only one robot is allowed to battle, only being able to switch with their team-mate by entering their team’s coloured zone.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror

Image.alt: The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror
The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror
The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror

Video.summary: The first heat of the Fifth Wars raises the bar for action. With newcomers outnumbering the veterans, will and underdog manage to secure a place in the finals?
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat A

Video.summary: One newcomer gets a forceful yet thorough tour of the arena hazards in the eliminators. Flippers prove to be this heats weapon of choice and they are put to great effect, as many robots take to the air.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat B

Video.summary: The eliminators continue as more newcomers and veterans enter the arena, ready to destroy each other for the spot in the finals. One competitor’s design renders their adversary’s weapon useless, can they adapt, or will they be wiped out?
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat C

Video.summary: More flipping action as we witness one of the quickest immobilisations in Robot Wars history. A house robot gets a little too eager when trying to pit a competitor.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat D

Video.summary: More hopefuls enter the arena, as they risk life and limb for a chance at the finals. An equally matched battle leaves the decisions to the judges, and two house robots work together to inflict some last minute damage.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat E

Video.summary: Halfway through the heats and the competition is on fire, literally. The arena is out for revenge after another competitor inadvertently vandalises it. One robot commits the ultimate sin, attacking the benevolent Refbot.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat F

Video.summary: The house robots venture into the funeral business as they hold cremations and burials in the Robot Wars arena, to the applause of a live audience. One flip may spell doom early on for one competitor.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat G

Video.summary: One competitor achieves every flipper robot’s dream in this episode’s heats, rapidly ending the first round. Another robot refuses to go into the pit alone and takes down whoever they can get grip on.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat H

Video.summary: One competitor gets chopped up by competitor and house robot alike and a quick eviction from the arena makes the judge’s job a simple one. A seemingly one-sided fight takes a different direction, thanks to the hazardous arena.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat I

Video.summary: When the competitor’s weapons aren’t quite doing the job, they must resort to using the arena to secure the win. There’s not enough room for the both of them, which robot from the Isle of Sheppey will prove itself the best in this chance encounter.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat J

Video.summary: World Champions meet a newcomer in this episode’s heat, will it be an easy appetiser, or a major upset? One uneventful round leaves the house robots responsible for entertaining the crowd.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: The last heats of the fifth series. Matilda breaks the rules and strays from her zone, inflicting massive damage on unsuspecting robots, much to the dismay of the judges.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: The semi-finals are here and the competitors step up a notch, even the house robots need to be cautious. One of the three losers of the first rounds have an opportunity for redemption in the Losers Melee.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: Northerners compete in an annihilator. In the first round, all six robots would fight each other until one of them was eliminated. The process continued until only two robots remained, with the subsequent winner becoming the annihilator champion.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Northern Annihilator

Video.summary: The South’s turn for the annihilator. Same rules, different robots.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Southern Annihilator

Video.summary: The UK and USA battle it out to prove which country has the better robots. Each country has four robots representing and fighting for them. A straight knockout competition will determine a victor.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - War of Independence

Image.alt: The Fourth Wars - War of Independence
The Fourth Wars - War of Independence
The Fourth Wars - War of Independence

Video.summary: The heats resume this week, and one competitor has its own entrance ceremony. Gemini returns to the arena to prove themselves in Pinball Warrior.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat M

Video.summary: Renowned robot Firestorm 2 takes on Pinball Warrior this week and the heats are nearing their end. The house robots show no mercy against a flipped robot.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat N

Video.summary: Not even the arena floor is safe in this week’s eliminators, as the competitors go all out to best the opposition. One robot manages to take control in the heat finals.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat O

Video.summary: An impressive weapon manages to fight off two robots simultaneously, ripping through armor and insides. As one of the finalists is still reeling from the previous rounds, will they manage to come back and take the finals?
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat P

Video.summary: Heat winners gather for the beginning of The Fourth Wars semi-finals. Pinball Warrior and Sumo Bash make way for the brutal knockout competition.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: The last stage before the Grand Finals, and the pressure is on. With this level of carnage not all robots may leave the arena as they fight for the title, and their lives.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Semi Final 2

Video.summary: The Fourth Wars is coming to an end, beginning with two rounds of playoffs, where four will be whittled down to two. Of the remaining two, one will become Robot Wars: The Fourth Wars champions.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Grand Final
